assignment: audit protocol required_fields vs emitted records
key_findings: Collab bus protocol.json defines a single flat required_fields list applied to all ledgers; in practice, ledgers diverge (e.g., reviews omit evidence, broadcasts vary cross-ref fields).
Commander telemetry bus child-agents.jsonl has no schema and shows widespread missing run_id/commander_id, aliased event names, and ts vs timestamp inconsistencies.
Protocol is not enforced anywhere; monitor mostly line-counts JSONL, not validate fields/types.

evidence.note: commander_registered written to child-agents.jsonl without run_id
echo-based JSON write for orchestrator.jsonl (Landmine #1 risk)
counts JSONL lines in collab ledgers

mismatches_examples.issue: evidence missing though protocol requires it
evidence sometimes missing; adopted_items vs consensus_item_id drift
run_id missing on shell/agent emitted events; event name aliases

recommendations: Move from flat required_fields to per-ledger schema; make review-specific fields required and make evidence optional/removed for reviews.
Standardize child-agents.jsonl required fields (run_id, commander_id, ts) and event taxonomy; update commander agent spec examples accordingly.
Add protocol validator (test or monitor hook) that reads protocol.json and validates all JSONL records.
